name: valtik-mcp-security-scanner
description: Static audit for Model Context Protocol (MCP) server source. Detects MCP attack patterns (prompt injection, shell passthrough, unbounded FS, SSRF, credential exposure) plus supply-chain issues. SARIF 2.1.0 + JSON + Markdown + text outputs, severity filtering, baseline support, 62 tests, CI-ready.

scripts.test: node --test test/checks.test.js test/cli.test.js test/scan.test.js test/sarif.test.js test/markdown.test.js

author: Valtik Studios <hello@valtikstudios.com> (https://valtikstudios.com)
